chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 723 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.313/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.314/2022 (Restoration) 27-01-2022 Petitioner Habibullah, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This Petition has already been disposed of as it has served its purpose on 22-12-2021. The application does not merit any consideration nor the Petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. The same is misconceived and is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
